text:
Hunter × Hunter: The Real 4D (ハンター×ハンター・ザ・リアル 4D) was the first collaboration with Universal Studios Japan, a theme park located in Osaka, Japan. The attraction opened on March 4th, 2022, and ran through August 28th, 2022.

Plot

The movie begins with the two auctioneers warning the audience to look out for any suspicious activity or individuals, especially for the following wanted Hunters with large bounties: Gon Freecss (200 million), Killua Zoldyck (500 million), Kurapika (400 million), Leorio Paradinight (50 million), and Hisoka Morow (2 billion).

At an auction hosted by the Mafia Community, the four items up for auction are all on display. The female auctioneer surrounds herself in a purple aura, using Nen to lift the items and bring them closer to the audience for them to see. The first item is a Chimera Ant Egg that is described as a hybrid of an unknown creature and is considered exceptionally repulsive, even among other Chimera Ants. It is also warned that the creature could awaken if it were to receive even a small impact. The second item is a pair of Scarlet Eyes. The third item is a device capable of turning back time, but requires an exponentially large amount of Nen to be absorbed for activation. The male auctioneer also adds that it is continuously absorbing Nen. Before the fourth item can be introduced, the audience demands that they hurry up and begin the auction. The auctioneer acknowledges the request and starts the bidding for the Chimera Ant Egg. The starting bid for the egg is 5 billion and quickly rose to the final bid of 15 billion.

A deep voice can be heard voicing their disappointment regarding the transaction. They state that an item as amazing as this should be under the ownership of someone who is at least equal to it in value. They go on to say that if there is no such person, they will take it for themselves. The voice is revealed to belong to Hisoka, who takes over the auction. He announces that he will have the audience keep him entertained until his other toys arrive, and he begins to attack them with his cards. Gon is then heard chanting his Jajanken attack, breaking into the venue with Killua and Kurapika. Hisoka uses his Bungee Gum to secure the time device while the female auctioneer uses her Nen to secure the other auction items and to keep the debris from reaching the audience. Gon explains that the items up for auction were stolen, and that the Hunter Association sent them to retrieve them. Hisoka appears to have known that they were coming and uses his Bungee Gum to hold the Chimera Ant Egg hostage. Gon, Killua, and Kurapika engage Hisoka in battle to retrieve the egg. Killua uses Lightning Palm and Gon follows it up with a Paper attack. This causes the Chimera Ant Egg container to break, and the egg starts to hatch.

The Chimera Ant sets its eyes on the audience upon hatching, but Gon, Killua, and Kurapika focus on the Ant to protect the audience. After a while, the Ant takes note of the Scarlet Eyes and asks Kurapika if they are important to him. After it is revealed that Kurapika is the last surviving member of the Kurta Clan, he uses Emperor Time and continues to fight the Ant, declaring he will have it regret its actions. The situation becomes dire, and Gon risks his life to protect everyone in the venue with one last Jajanken attack to defeat the Ant. As they despaired over Gon's sacrifice, Hisoka brings their attention to the time device. Killua and Kurapika turn to the audience for help, and they all infuse their Nen into the device. It activates, and they work together to finish the Ant once Gon is saved. After the Hunters leave the venue, Leorio enters. The auctioneer tells him that his friends have already left, and the movie comes to an end.
